name: Strawberries Elegante
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Orange flavored liqueur, OR orange juice
1 tablespoon Orange flavored liqueur, OR orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss strawberries with 2 tablespoons of liqueur in a small bowl.
2. In a food processor or blender container, combine the cream cheese product, brown sugar, 1 tablespoon of liqueur and milk until well blended.
3. Serve over strawberries. Garnish with fresh mint leaves, if desired.
170 calories; 7 g fat; 220 mg sodium; 20 mg cholesterol Source: No Guilt Desserts
